questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: Amazon EC2 隨選執行個體對於哪些用例最具成本效益？
question_text.en: For which use case are Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances MOST cost-effective?

A.zh: 計算密集型視訊轉碼，如有必要可以重新啟動
A.en: Compute-intensive video transcoding that can be restarted if necessary

B.zh: 連續使用1個月進行品質保證測試的實例
B.en: An instance in continual use for 1 month to conduct quality assurance tests

C.zh: 執行將執行 1 年的 Web 伺服器的實例
C.en: An instance that runs a web server that will run for 1 year

D.zh: 運行資料庫的實例將運行 3 年
D.en: An instance that runs a database that will run for 3 years

A.zh: 錯誤。- Bug：對於可以中斷的計算任務，使用 Spot 實例更經濟，因為 Spot 實例更便宜且適合非關鍵任務。按需實例不適合這種場景。
A.en: Incorrect. - Bug: For computing tasks that can be interrupted, it is more economical to use Spot Instances because Spot Instances are cheaper and suitable for non-critical tasks. On-Demand Instances are not suitable for this scenario.

B.zh: 正確。- 按需實例最適合短期使用場景，例如持續一個月的品質保證測試。它提供靈活性，無需長期承諾。
B.en: Correct. - On-Demand Instances are best suited for short-term usage scenarios, such as quality assurance testing that lasts a month. It offers flexibility without the need for a long-term commitment.

C.zh: 錯誤。- Bug：對於長期運行的實例（例如 1 年），預留實例或 Savings Plans 更具成本效益，因為它們提供折扣價格。
C.en: Incorrect. - Bug: For long-running instances (e.g. 1 year), Reserved Instances or Savings Plans are more cost-effective because they offer discounted prices.

D.zh: 錯誤。- 對於長期運行的資料庫執行個體（例如 3 年），預留執行個體或節省計劃是更經濟的選擇，因為它們可以顯著節省成本。
D.en: Incorrect. - For long-running database instances (e.g. 3 years), Reserved Instances or Savings Plans are more economical options as they provide significant cost savings.

answer_text.zh: B. 連續使用1個月進行品質保證測試的實例
answer_text.en: B. An instance in continual use for 1 month to conduct quality assurance tests

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：- 按需實例最適合短期使用場景，例如持續一個月的品質保證測試。它提供靈活性，無需長期承諾。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: - On-Demand Instances are best suited for short-term usage scenarios, such as quality assurance testing that lasts a month. It offers flexibility without the need for a long-term commitment.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司開發了一種新的內部應用程式。該公司無法確定或預測應用程式將創建的使用需求。公司正在尋求哪種 AWS 雲端運算優勢？
question_text.en: A company has developed a new In-house application. The company does not have a way to determine or predict the usage demand that the application will create. Which AWS Cloud computing benefit is the company seeking?

A.zh: 易於使用
A.en: Easy to use

B.zh: 性價比高
B.en: Cost-effective

C.zh: 安全
C.en: Secure

D.zh: 可擴展且高效能
D.en: Scalable and high performance

A.zh: 錯誤。雖然AWS確實好用，但這個問題的重點在於解決不可預測的使用需求，而不是平臺的易用性。
A.en: Incorrect. Although AWS is indeed easy to use, the focus of this question is to solve unpredictable usage needs, not the ease of use of the platform.

B.zh: 錯誤。成本效益是 AWS 的優勢，但它與解決不可預測的使用需求無關。
B.en: Incorrect. Cost effectiveness is an advantage of AWS, but it has nothing to do with addressing unpredictable usage demands.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：安全性是AWS的核心優勢之一，但它與本問題所描述的需求無關。
C.en: Incorrect. Security is one of the core strengths of AWS, but it has nothing to do with the needs described in this question.

D.zh: 正確。AWS的可擴充性和高效能可以幫助企業應對不可預測的使用需求，並確保應用程式在任何負載下都能正常運作。
D.en: Correct. AWS's scalability and high performance can help enterprises cope with unpredictable usage demands and ensure that applications can run normally under any load.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS的可擴充性和高效能可以幫助企業應對不可預測的使用需求，並確保應用程式在任何負載下都能正常運作。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS's scalability and high performance can help enterprises cope with unpredictable usage demands and ensure that applications can run normally under any load.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 產品可以分析公司的 AWS 環境以發現 Amazon EC2 執行個體上的安全漏洞？
question_text.en: Which AWS offering can analyze a company’s AWS environment to discover security vulnerabilities on Amazon EC2 instances?

A.zh: 亞馬遜檢查員
A.en: Amazon Inspector

B.zh: 亞馬遜 Macie
B.en: Amazon Macie

C.zh: AWS Shield 標準
C.en: AWS Shield Standard

D.zh: 安全群組
D.en: Security groups

A.zh: 正確。Amazon Inspector 是一項自動化安全評估服務，可分析 Amazon EC2 執行個體的安全漏洞以及不符合最佳實務的情況。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Amazon Inspector is an automated security assessment service that analyzes Amazon EC2 instances for security vulnerabilities and noncompliance with best practices.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Macie 主要旨在識別和保護敏感資料（例如 PII），而不是分析 EC2 執行個體的安全漏洞。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Macie is primarily designed to identify and protect sensitive data (such as PII) rather than analyze EC2 instances for security vulnerabilities.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Shield Standard 是針對 DDoS 攻擊的保護服務，與 EC2 執行個體的安全漏洞分析無關。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Shield Standard is a protection service against DDoS attacks and has nothing to do with security vulnerability analysis of EC2 instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：安全群組是用來控制網路流量的防火牆規則，不具備分析安全漏洞的功能。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Security groups are firewall rules used to control network traffic and do not have the function of analyzing security vulnerabilities.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon Inspector 是一項自動化安全評估服務，可分析 Amazon EC2 執行個體的安全漏洞以及不符合最佳實務的情況。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Inspector is an automated security assessment service that analyzes Amazon EC2 instances for security vulnerabilities and noncompliance with best practices.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司計劃招募將遠距工作的新員工。公司需要建置Windows虛擬桌面，為新進員工打造一個工作環境。員工必須能夠從任何地方使用電腦或網路瀏覽器存取工作環境。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company plans to onboard new employees that will be working remotely. The company needs to set up Windows virtual desktops to create a working environment for the new employees. The employees must be able access the working environment from anywhere and by using their computer or a web browser. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 專用主機
A.en: Dedicated Hosts

B.zh: AWS 全球加速器
B.en: AWS Global Accelerator

C.zh: 亞馬遜工作區
C.en: Amazon Workspaces

D.zh: 亞馬遜 CloudFront
D.en: Amazon CloudFront

A.zh: 錯誤。是用於配置實體伺服器的專用主機，主要是為了滿足合規性或授權要求。它不適合創建虛擬檢查環境，所以這個選項是。
A.en: Incorrect. are dedicated hosts used to provision physical servers, primarily to meet compliance or licensing requirements. It is not suitable for creating virtual inspection environments, so this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一項 Web 服務，可優化世界各地使用者存取的應用程式的效能。與虛擬檢測環境無關，因此該選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is a web service that optimizes the performance of applications accessed by users around the world. It has nothing to do with the virtual inspection environment, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。是一項託管虛擬檢查服務，允許使用者透過電腦或瀏覽器從任何地方存取其工作環境。完全符合題目要求，所以這個選項是。
C.en: Correct. is a hosted virtual inspection service that allows users to access their work environment from anywhere through a computer or browser. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一種內容傳遞網路 (CDN) 服務，用於加速網站、影片和其他內容的分發。與虛擬檢測環境無關，所以這個選項是。
D.en: Incorrect. is a content delivery network (CDN) service used to accelerate the delivery of websites, videos, and other content. It has nothing to do with the virtual inspection environment, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一項託管虛擬檢查服務，允許使用者透過電腦或瀏覽器從任何地方存取其工作環境。完全符合題目要求，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a hosted virtual inspection service that allows users to access their work environment from anywhere through a computer or browser. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望視覺化和管理特定時間內的 AWS 雲端成本和使用情況。哪些 AWS 服務或功能可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to visualize and manage AWS Cloud costs and usage for a specific period of time. Which AWS service or feature will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 成本管理器
A.en: Cost Explorer

B.zh: 合併帳單
B.en: Consolidated billing

C.zh: AWS 組織
C.en: AWS Organizations

D.zh: AWS 預算
D.en: AWS Budgets

A.zh: 正確。Cost Explorer 是 AWS 提供的工具，用於視覺化和分析 AWS 服務的成本和使用情況。支援按時間段查看成本趨勢，並提供詳細的報表功能，非常適合滿足問題的要求。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Cost Explorer is a tool provided by AWS for visualizing and analyzing the cost and usage of AWS services. It supports viewing cost trends by time period and provides detailed reporting functions, which is very suitable for meeting the requirements of the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：合併帳單是AWS Organizations的一項功能，用於將多個帳戶的帳單合併到一個主帳戶中，以方便集中管理，但不提供視覺化和分析功能。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Consolidated billing is a feature of AWS Organizations that is used to consolidate bills from multiple accounts into one master account to facilitate centralized management, but it does not provide visualization and analysis functions.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Organizations 是一項用於管理多個 AWS 帳戶的服務，支援帳戶分組和權限管理，但不直接提供成本視覺化和分析功能。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Organizations is a service used to manage multiple AWS accounts and supports account grouping and permission management, but it does not directly provide cost visualization and analysis functions.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Budgets 用於設定成本或使用預算並提供警報功能，但不提供詳細的成本視覺化和分析功能。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Budgets is used to set cost or usage budgets and provides alerting capabilities, but it does not provide detailed cost visualization and analysis capabilities.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Cost Explorer 是 AWS 提供的工具，用於視覺化和分析 AWS 服務的成本和使用情況。支援按時間段查看成本趨勢，並提供詳細的報表功能，非常適合滿足問題的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Cost Explorer is a tool provided by AWS for visualizing and analyzing the cost and usage of AWS services. It supports viewing cost trends by time period and provides detailed reporting functions, which is very suitable for meeting the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服務支援 MySQL 資料庫引擎？
question_text.en: Which AWS service supports MySQL database engines?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 Dynamo DВ
A.en: Amazon Dynamo DВ

B.zh: 亞馬遜 RDS
B.en: Amazon RDS

C.zh: Amazon DocumentDB（與 MongoDB 相容）
C.en: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility)

D.zh: Amazon ElastiCache
D.en: Amazon ElastiCache

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon DynamoDB 是完全託管的 NoSQL 資料庫服務，不支援 MySQL 資料庫引擎。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon DynamoDB is a fully managed NoSQL database service and does not support the MySQL database engine.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon RDS（關聯式資料庫服務）支援多種關聯式資料庫引擎，包括 MySQL。
B.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Amazon RDS (Relational Database Service) supports multiple relational database engines, including MySQL.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon DocumentDB 是一種文件資料庫服務，旨在與 MongoDB 相容，不支援 MySQL。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon DocumentDB is a document database service designed for compatibility with MongoDB and does not support MySQL.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：Amazon ElastiCache 是託管快取服務，支援 Redis 和 Memcached，但不支援 MySQL。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon ElastiCache is a managed caching service that supports Redis and Memcached, but does not support MySQL.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon RDS（關聯式資料庫服務）支援多種關聯式資料庫引擎，包括 MySQL。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon RDS (Relational Database Service) supports multiple relational database engines, including MySQL.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司為 AWS 雲端中的工作負載購買了 Amazon EC2 標準預留執行個體 (RI)。本公司需要將部分工作負載轉移到與這些標準預留實例的實例係列不符的實例係列。公司如何運用不再需要的標準 RI？
question_text.en: A company purchased Amazon EC2 Standard Reserved Instances (RIs) for a workload in the AWS Cloud. The company needs to move part of the workload to an instance family that does not match the instance family of these Standard RIs. How can the company take advantage of the Standard RIs that it no longer needs?

A.zh: 聯絡 AWS Support 團隊，並要求團隊銷售標準 RI
A.en: Contact the AWS Support team, and ask the team to sell the Standard RIs

B.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 預留執行個體市場上銷售標準 RI
B.en: Sell the Standard RIs on the Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance Marketplace

C.zh: 作為第三方賣家在 AWS Marketplace 上銷售標準 RI
C.en: Sell the Standard RIs as a third-party seller on the AWS Marketplace

D.zh: 將標準 RI 轉換為 Savings Plans
D.en: Convert the Standard RIs to Savings Plans

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Support 團隊無法直接協助客戶銷售標準預留執行個體。客戶需自行在Amazon EC2預留執行個體市場上執行操作。
A.en: Incorrect. The AWS Support team cannot directly assist customers selling Standard Reserved Instances. Customers need to perform operations on the Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance Marketplace themselves.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon EC2 預留執行個體市場允許客戶出售其他 AWS 使用者不再需要的標準預留執行個體。
B.en: Correct. The Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance Marketplace allows customers to sell Standard Reserved Instances that are no longer needed to other AWS users.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Marketplace 是一個銷售軟體和服務的市場，而不是銷售 EC2 預留執行個體的市場。
C.en: Incorrect. AWS Marketplace is a marketplace for selling software and services, not for selling EC2 Reserved Instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。標準預留實例無法直接轉換為 Savings Plans。 Savings Plans 是不同的定價模型，與預留實例沒有直接的換算關係。
D.en: Incorrect. Standard Reserved Instances cannot be converted directly to Savings Plans. Savings Plans are a different pricing model and have no direct translation relationship with Reserved Instances.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 Amazon EC2 預留執行個體市場上銷售標準 RI
answer_text.en: B. Sell the Standard RIs on the Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance Marketplace

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon EC2 預留執行個體市場允許客戶出售其他 AWS 使用者不再需要的標準預留執行個體。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The Amazon EC2 Reserved Instance Marketplace allows customers to sell Standard Reserved Instances that are no longer needed to other AWS users.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在發布一個關鍵業務應用程式。在發布之前，該公司需要AWS的策略規劃協助。在發布期間，該公司需要AWS基礎設施事件管理和即時支援。為了滿足這些要求，公司該做什麼？
question_text.en: A company is releasing a business-critical application. Before the release, the company needs strategic planning assistance from AWS. During the release, the company needs AWS infrastructure event management and real-time support. What should the company do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 造訪 AWS Trusted Advisor
A.en: Access AWS Trusted Advisor

B.zh: 聯絡 AWS 合作夥伴網路 (APN)
B.en: Contact the AWS Partner Network (APN)

C.zh: 註冊 AWS 企業支持
C.en: Sign up for AWS Enterprise Support

D.zh: 聯絡 AWS 專業服務
D.en: Contact AWS Professional Services

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Trusted Advisor 是一個提供最佳化建議（例如成本優化、安全性、效能等）的工具，但它不提供策略規劃或即時支援服務。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS Trusted Advisor is a tool that provides optimization recommendations (such as cost optimization, security, performance, etc.), but it does not provide strategic planning or real-time support services.

B.zh: 錯誤。APN 是一個提供第三方解決方案和服務的 AWS 合作夥伴網絡，但它不直接提供 AWS 策略規劃或即時支援服務。
B.en: Incorrect. APN is an AWS partner network that provides third-party solutions and services, but it does not directly provide AWS strategic planning or real-time support services.

C.zh: 正確。AWS Enterprise Support 提供策略規劃支援、AWS 基礎設施事件管理 (IEM) 和即時支援服務，完全滿足問題需求。
C.en: Correct. AWS Enterprise Support provides strategic planning support, AWS Infrastructure Event Management (IEM), and real-time support services, which fully meets the question requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS 專業服務提供諮詢服務來協助客戶設計和實施解決方案，但不提供即時支援或事件管理服務。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS Professional Services provides consulting services to help customers design and implement solutions, but it does not provide real-time support or incident management services.

answer_text.zh: C. 註冊 AWS 企業支持
answer_text.en: C. Sign up for AWS Enterprise Support

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (75%)； D (25%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Enterprise Support 提供策略規劃支援、AWS 基礎設施事件管理 (IEM) 和即時支援服務，完全滿足問題需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (75%); D (25%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Enterprise Support provides strategic planning support, AWS Infrastructure Event Management (IEM), and real-time support services, which fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望透過為員工提供搜尋問題和檢索具體答案的方式來提高員工的工作效率。該公司希望使用單一的智慧搜尋介面。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to improve employee productivity by providing a way for employees to search for questions and retrieve specific answers. The company wants to use a single intelligent search interface. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 亞馬遜連接
A.en: Amazon Connect

B.zh: 亞馬遜肯德拉
B.en: Amazon Kendra

C.zh: 亞馬遜 Lex
C.en: Amazon Lex

D.zh: 亞馬遜理解
D.en: Amazon Comprehend

A.zh: 錯誤。是一個以雲端為中心的解決方案，用於管理客戶互動。它不適用於智慧搜尋介面，因此此選項可以。
A.en: Incorrect. is a cloud-centric solution for managing customer interactions. It does not work with the smart search interface, so this option is.

B.zh: 正確。是專為幫助使用者快速搜尋、查看相關資訊而設計的智慧搜尋服務。完全符合題目要求，所以這個選項是。
B.en: Correct. is an intelligent search service specially designed to help users quickly search and check relevant information. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一個建構會話麵條的服務，主要用於創建甘天機器人和語音助理。雖然它涉及自然語言處理，但它並不專注於搜尋功能，因此這個選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. is a service for building conversational noodles, mainly used to create Gantian robots and voice assistants. Although it involves natural language processing, it does not focus on search functionality, so this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一種自然語言處理服務，用於分析文字情緒、擷取關鍵字等。它不提供搜尋功能，所以這個選項是。
D.en: Incorrect. is a natural language processing service used to analyze text sentiment, extract keywords, and more. It does not provide search functionality, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (83%)； A (17%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是專為幫助使用者快速搜尋、查看相關資訊而設計的智慧搜尋服務。完全符合題目要求，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (83%); A (17%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is an intelligent search service specially designed to help users quickly search and check relevant information. It fully meets the question requirements, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要一個 Amazon S3 解決方案，能夠在個位數毫秒內提供對物件儲存的存取。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants an Amazon S3 solution that provides access to object storage within single-digit milliseconds. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: S3快車一區
A.en: S3 Express One Zone

B.zh: S3 標準
B.en: S3 Standard

C.zh: S3 Glacier 彈性檢索
C.en: S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval

D.zh: S3冰河即時檢索
D.en: S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval

A.zh: 正確。Amazon S3 中沒有名為「S3 Express One Zone」的儲存類別。杯子選項可能會產生誤導或拼寫錯誤。
A.en: Correct. There is no storage class named "S3 Express One Zone" in Amazon S3. Cup options may be misleading or misspelled.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：S3 標準儲存類別提供高可用性和低延遲（每秒存取時間），適合頻繁存取的資料。
B.en: Incorrect. The S3 Standard storage class provides high availability and low latency (access time per second), which is suitable for frequently accessed data.

C.zh: 錯誤。S3 Glacier靈活檢索主要用於傳回資料。訪問時延通常為幾分鐘到幾小時，無法滿足單秒訪問的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval is mainly used for return data. The access delay is usually a few minutes to a few hours, which does not meet the requirements of single-second access.

D.zh: 錯誤。雖然S3 Glacier即時檢索提供亞秒訪問，但它主要用於返回資料和成本優化場景，而不是標準物件儲存場景。
D.en: Incorrect. Although S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval provides sub-second access, it is mainly used in return data and cost optimization scenarios rather than standard object storage scenarios.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (58%)； B (42%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon S3 中沒有名為「S3 Express One Zone」的儲存類別。杯子選項可能會產生誤導或拼寫錯誤。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (58%); B (42%). Popular discussion and key point summary: There is no storage class named "S3 Express One Zone" in Amazon S3. Cup options may be misleading or misspelled.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司每週 7 天、每天 24 小時在 AWS 上運行不間斷的 Amazon EC2 工作負載。該公司將需要相同的實例係列和實例類型來運行接下來 12 個月的工作負載。公司應該選擇哪種採購選項組合來最大程度地優化成本？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company runs an uninterruptible Amazon EC2 workload on AWS 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. The company will require the same instance family and instance type to run the workload for the next 12 months. Which combination of purchasing options should the company choose to MOST optimize costs? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 標準預留實例
A.en: Standard Reserved Instance

B.zh: 可轉換預留實例
B.en: Convertible Reserved Instance

C.zh: 計算儲蓄計劃
C.en: Compute Savings Plan

D.zh: 競價實例
D.en: Spot Instance

A.zh: 正確。標準預留執行個體適用於長期穩定的工作負載，可大幅節省成本，特別是當工作負載需要固定執行個體類型和實例係列時。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Standard Reserved Instance is suitable for long-term stable workloads and provides significant cost savings, especially when the workload requires a fixed instance type and instance family.

B.zh: 錯誤。儘管可轉換預留實例允許實例類型和系列之間的轉換，但其折扣通常低於標準預留實例。問題明確指出需要固定的執行個體類型和系列，因此不需要 Convertible 的彈性。
B.en: Incorrect. Although Convertible Reserved Instance allows conversion between instance types and families, it generally comes at a lower discount than Standard Reserved Instance. The question clearly states that fixed instance types and families are required, so the flexibility of Convertible is not required.

C.zh: 錯誤。運算節省計畫提供彈性，允許跨實例類型和系列使用，但折扣通常低於標準預留實例。這個問題顯然需要固定的實例類型和系列，因此 Compute Savings Plan 不是最佳選擇。
C.en: Incorrect. The Compute Savings Plan offers flexibility, allowing usage across instance types and families, but the discounts are typically lower than Standard Reserved Instances. The question clearly requires a fixed instance type and family, so Compute Savings Plan is not the best choice.

D.zh: 錯誤。Spot 執行個體價格便宜，但不適合需要 24/7 運作且無法中斷的工作負載，因為 Spot 執行個體可以隨時中斷。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Spot Instance is inexpensive, but is not suitable for workloads that need to run 24/7 and cannot be interrupted, because Spot Instances can be interrupted at any time.

E.zh: 正確。選擇全預付方式可以進一步降低預留實例的成本，是最佳化成本的最佳實踐之一。
E.en: Correct. Choosing the All Upfront payment method can further reduce the cost of Reserved Instance and is one of the best practices for optimizing costs.

answer_text.zh: A. 標準預留實例；E. 全部預付款
answer_text.en: A. Standard Reserved Instance; E. All Upfront payment

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：AE (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：標準預留執行個體適用於長期穩定的工作負載，可大幅節省成本，特別是當工作負載需要固定執行個體類型和實例係列時。；選擇全預付方式可以進一步降低預留實例的成本，是最佳化成本的最佳實踐之一。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: AE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Standard Reserved Instance is suitable for long-term stable workloads and provides significant cost savings, especially when the workload requires a fixed instance type and instance family.; Choosing the All Upfront payment method can further reduce the cost of Reserved Instance and is one of the best practices for optimizing costs.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望運行其應用程式的程式碼，而無需配置和管理伺服器。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to run its application's code without having to provision and manage servers. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: AWS 膠水
A.en: AWS Glue

B.zh: AWS Lambda
B.en: AWS Lambda

C.zh: AWS CodeDeploy
C.en: AWS CodeDeploy

D.zh: 亞馬遜 CodeGuru
D.en: Amazon CodeGuru

A.zh: 錯誤。是一項完全託管的 ETL（提取、轉換、載入）服務，主要用於資料處理和轉換，而不是運行應用程式程式碼。這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is a fully managed ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) service designed primarily for data processing and transformation rather than running application code. This option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。是一種無伺服器運算服務，允許使用者在不管理底層伺服器的情況下運行程式碼。這個選項是。
B.en: Correct. is a serverless computing service that allows users to run code without managing the underlying servers. This option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一種部署服務，可自動執行應用程式的部署過程，但它不執行程式碼。這個選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. is a deployment service that automates the deployment process of applications, but it does not run code. This option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一款程式碼分析工具，可以幫助開發者在不運行程式碼的情況下優化程式碼品質和效能。這個選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. is a code analysis tool that helps developers optimize code quality and performance without running the code. This option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一種無伺服器運算服務，允許使用者在不管理底層伺服器的情況下運行程式碼。這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a serverless computing service that allows users to run code without managing the underlying servers. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正計劃遷移到 AWS 雲端。公司需要了解現有的本地使用情況和配置。該公司目前還不想將其工作負載複製到 AWS。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company needs to understand the existing on-premises usage and configuration. The company does not want to replicate its workloads to AWS, yet. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS 應用程式發現服務
A.en: AWS Application Discovery Service

B.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務
B.en: AWS Application Migration Service

C.zh: 雲端遷移工廠
C.en: Cloud Migration Factory

D.zh: AWS 傳輸系列
D.en: AWS Transfer Family

A.zh: 正確。該服務旨在幫助客戶發現和分析其現有的本地環境，包括伺服器配置、使用情況和依賴項。它是遷移前評估的關鍵工具。
A.en: Correct. This service is designed to help customers discover and analyze their existing on-premises environment, including server configuration, usage and dependencies. It is a key tool for pre-migration assessment.

B.zh: 錯誤。該服務用於將本機應用程式遷移到AWS，但標題明確指出該公司不希望立即遷移工作負載。
B.en: Incorrect. This service is used to migrate on-premises applications to AWS, but the title clearly states that the company does not want to migrate the workload immediately.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS 沒有名為「Cloud Migration Factory」的服務，這可能是虛構或誤導的選項。
C.en: Incorrect. AWS does not have a service named "Cloud Migration Factory", this may be a fictitious or misleading option.

D.zh: 錯誤。此服務用於安全地將檔案傳輸至 AWS，但與評估您的本機環境無關。
D.en: Incorrect. This service is used to securely transfer files to AWS, but is not relevant for evaluating your local environment.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS 應用程式發現服務

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：該服務旨在幫助客戶發現和分析其現有的本地環境，包括伺服器配置、使用情況和依賴項。它是遷移前評估的關鍵工具。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This service is designed to help customers discover and analyze their existing on-premises environment, including server configuration, usage and dependencies. It is a key tool for pre-migration assessment.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望允許其員工在家遠距工作。公司員工使用Windows或Linux桌面。公司員工需要使用任何支援的設備隨時隨地進行存取。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to allow its employees to work remotely from home. The company's employees use Windows or Linux desktops. The company's employees need access from anywhere and at anytime by using any supported devices. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 亞馬遜工作區
A.en: Amazon Workspaces

B.zh: 亞馬遜 AppStream 2.0
B.en: Amazon AppStream 2.0

C.zh: Amazon Keyspaces（適用於 Apache Cassandra）
C.en: Amazon Keyspaces (for Apache Cassandra)

D.zh: AWS Cloud9
D.en: AWS Cloud9

A.zh: 正確。是一項託管虛擬暫存服務，可讓使用者從任何支援的裝置遠端存取其暫存環境。它支援Windows和Linux作業系統，非常適合員工的遠端工作需求。因此，這個選項是。
A.en: Correct. is a managed virtual staging service that allows users to remotely access their staging environment from any supported device. It supports Windows and Linux operating systems, making it ideal for employees' remote working needs. Therefore, this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一種應用程式流程服務，主要設計用於提供對特定應用程式的訪問，而不是完整的暫存環境。因此，不完全滿足題中「遠端存取結帳」的要求，這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is an application streaming service designed primarily to provide access to specific applications rather than a complete staging environment. Therefore, it does not fully meet the requirements of "remote access checkout" in the question, and this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Keyspaces 是一項託管 Apache Cassandra 資料庫服務，與遠端結帳或應用程式存取無關。因此，這個選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon Keyspaces is a managed Apache Cassandra database service that has nothing to do with remote checkout or application access. Therefore, this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一個基於雲端的輸入開發環境 (IDE)，主要用於程式設計和開發工作，而不是提供遠端結帳存取。因此，這個選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. is a cloud-based input development environment (IDE) primarily used for programming and development work, rather than providing remote checkout access. Therefore, this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一項託管虛擬暫存服務，可讓使用者從任何支援的裝置遠端存取其暫存環境。它支援Windows和Linux作業系統，非常適合員工的遠端工作需求。因此，這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a managed virtual staging service that allows users to remotely access their staging environment from any supported device. It supports Windows and Linux operating systems, making it ideal for employees' remote working needs. Therefore, this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要測試一個新應用程式。哪項 AWS 原則將幫助公司測試應用程式？
question_text.en: A company wants to test a new application. Which AWS principle will help the company test the application?

A.zh: 做出長期承諾以換取成本折扣。
A.en: Make long-term commitments in exchange for a cost discount.

B.zh: 根據需要擴大或縮小規模，無需做出任何長期承諾。
B.en: Scale up and down when needed without any long-term commitments.

C.zh: 完全控制應用程式基礎架構。
C.en: Have total control over the application infrastructure.

D.zh: 管理與雲端相關的所有維護任務。
D.en: Manage all of the maintenance tasks associated with the cloud.

A.zh: 錯誤。杯子選項。長期承諾通常與預留實例相關，但這不適合測試新應用程序，因為測試桶需要靈活性，而長期承諾限制了這種靈活性。
A.en: Incorrect. cup option. Long-term commitments are often associated with Reserved Instances, but this is not suitable for testing new applications because testing buckets require flexibility, and long-term commitments limit this flexibility.

B.zh: 正確。Cup options 是 AWS 的按需資源使用模型，允許使用者根據需要動態調整資源規模，無需長期承諾，非常適合測試新應用程式。
B.en: Correct. Cup options are AWS's on-demand resource usage model allows users to dynamically adjust resource scale as needed without long-term commitment, making it ideal for testing new applications.

C.zh: 錯誤。杯子選項。雖然AWS提供了對基礎設施的控制，但測試新應用程式的重點是靈活性和成本最佳化，而不是對基礎設施的完全控制。
C.en: Incorrect. cup option. While AWS provides control over the infrastructure, the focus of testing new applications is on flexibility and cost optimization rather than full control of the infrastructure.

D.zh: 錯誤。杯子選項。 AWS的託管服務（如RDS、Lambda等）可以減少使用者的維護任務，但這與測試新應用程式的核心需求無關。
D.en: Incorrect. cup option. AWS's managed services (such as RDS, Lambda, etc.) can reduce users' maintenance tasks, but this has nothing to do with the core need of testing new applications.

answer_text.zh: B. 根據需要擴大或縮小規模，無需做出任何長期承諾。
answer_text.en: B. Scale up and down when needed without any long-term commitments.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Cup options 是 AWS 的按需資源使用模型，允許使用者根據需要動態調整資源規模，無需長期承諾，非常適合測試新應用程式。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Cup options are AWS's on-demand resource usage model allows users to dynamically adjust resource scale as needed without long-term commitment, making it ideal for testing new applications.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司計劃推出一個電子商務網站，其中包含許多產品目錄圖像。該公司希望將網站的營運成本控制在特定的預算範圍內。公司應使用哪種 AWS 服務或工具來監控網站的持續成本？
question_text.en: A company plans to launch an ecommerce website that contains many images for a product catalog. The company wants to keep the cost of running the website within a specific budget. Which AWS service or tool should the company use to monitor the ongoing costs of the website?

A.zh: AWS Cost Explorer
A.en: AWS Cost Explorer

B.zh: AWS 開發工具包
B.en: AWS SDKs

C.zh: EC2 映像產生器
C.en: EC2 Image Builder

D.zh: AWS CloudFormation
D.en: AWS CloudFormation

A.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：AWS Cost Explorer 是一款幫助使用者檢視和分析其 AWS 帳戶的成本和使用情況的工具。它非常適合監控和管理預算，特別是對於持續運作的服務（例如電子商務網站）。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS Cost Explorer is a tool that helps users view and analyze the costs and usage of their AWS accounts. It's great for monitoring and managing budgets, especially for services that run continuously (such as e-commerce websites).

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS 開發工具包是用於與 AWS 服務進行程式設計互動的開發工具包。它不用於成本監控。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS SDKs are development toolkits for programmatic interaction with AWS services. It is not used for cost monitoring.

C.zh: 錯誤。EC2 Image Builder 用於自動建立和管理虛擬機器映像，而不考慮成本監控。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: EC2 Image Builder is used to automate the creation and management of virtual machine images, regardless of cost monitoring.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS CloudFormation 用於自動化資源部署和管理。雖然它可以間接影響成本，但它並不是專門的成本監控工具。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS CloudFormation is used to automate resource deployment and management. Although it can indirectly affect costs, it is not a specialized cost monitoring tool.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (75%)； C (25%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：AWS Cost Explorer 是一款幫助使用者檢視和分析其 AWS 帳戶的成本和使用情況的工具。它非常適合監控和管理預算，特別是對於持續運作的服務（例如電子商務網站）。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (75%); C (25%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Cost Explorer is a tool that helps users view and analyze the costs and usage of their AWS accounts. It's great for monitoring and managing budgets, especially for services that run continuously (such as e-commerce websites).

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Application Load Balancer 後面部署了多個公共應用程式。該公司希望提高應用程式的效能。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has deployed several public applications behind Application Load Balancers. The company wants to improve the performance of the applications. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS 全球加速器
A.en: AWS Global Accelerator

B.zh: 亞馬遜連接
B.en: Amazon Connect

C.zh: Amazon ElastiCache
C.en: Amazon ElastiCache

D.zh: 亞馬遜 CloudWatch
D.en: Amazon CloudWatch

A.zh: 正確。AWS Global Accelerator 是一項網路優化服務，可透過使用世界各地的邊緣網路加速流量來提高應用程式效能和可用性。特別適合需要低延遲、高效能的應用場景。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS Global Accelerator is a network optimization service that improves application performance and availability by accelerating traffic using edge networks anywhere in the world. It is especially suitable for application scenarios that require low latency and high performance.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Connect 是一項用於客戶支援和呼叫中心場景的雲端聯絡中心服務，與應用程式效能最佳化無關。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Connect is a cloud contact center service used in customer support and call center scenarios and has nothing to do with application performance optimization.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：Amazon ElastiCache 是一項記憶體快取服務，用於加速資料庫查詢和應用程式資料存儲，但它主要優化資料庫效能而不是整體應用程式效能。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon ElastiCache is an in-memory caching service used to accelerate database queries and application data storage, but it mainly optimizes database performance rather than overall application performance.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon CloudWatch 是一項監控和日誌記錄服務，可追蹤資源使用情況和效能指標，但它不會直接提高應用程式效能。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon CloudWatch is a monitoring and logging service that tracks resource usage and performance metrics, but it does not directly improve application performance.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Global Accelerator 是一項網路優化服務，可透過使用世界各地的邊緣網路加速流量來提高應用程式效能和可用性。特別適合需要低延遲、高效能的應用場景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Global Accelerator is a network optimization service that improves application performance and availability by accelerating traffic using edge networks anywhere in the world. It is especially suitable for application scenarios that require low latency and high performance.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個本地應用程式。該應用程式的處理時間不到 5 分鐘，並且每天僅調用幾次。該公司希望將應用程式遷移到 AWS 雲端。哪種 AWS 服務能夠以最具成本效益的方式支援該應用程式？
question_text.en: A company has an on-premises application. The application has processing times of less than 5 minutes and is invoked only a few times each day. The company wants to move the application to the AWS Cloud. Which AWS service will support this application MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)
A.en: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)

B.zh: AWS Lambda
B.en: AWS Lambda

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes 服務 (Amazon EKS)
C.en: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)

D.zh: 亞馬遜 EC2
D.en: Amazon EC2

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon ECS 是適合運行容器化應用程式的容器編排服務。雖然可以支援該應用，但對於呼叫頻率較低的應用，ECS 可能會產生額外的管理和運行成本，因此不是最具成本效益的選擇。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon ECS is a container orchestration service suitable for running containerized applications. Although it can support this application, for applications with low frequency calls, ECS may incur additional management and running costs and therefore is not the most cost-effective option.

B.zh: 正確。是一種無伺服器計費服務，根據使用情況計費。它非常適合處理低頻、耗時的任務，因為使用者只需為實際執行時間付費，不需要管理底層基礎設施。這是最具成本效益的類固醇選擇。
B.en: Correct. is a serverless billing service that is billed based on usage. It is ideal for processing low-frequency, time-consuming tasks because users only pay for the actual execution time and do not need to manage the underlying infrastructure. This is the most cost-effective steroid option.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EKS 是一項託管 Kubernetes 服務，適合執行容器化應用程式。與ECS類似，需要額外的管理和營運成本，不適合呼叫頻率較低的應用。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon EKS is a managed Kubernetes service suitable for running containerized applications. Similar to ECS, it requires additional management and operation costs and is not suitable for applications with low frequency calls.

D.zh: 錯誤。提供虛擬機器服務，使用者需要為實例的運行時間付費。即使應用程式只運行幾分鐘，啟動和運行EC2實例的成本仍然很高，因此不適合呼叫頻率較低的應用程式。
D.en: Incorrect. provides virtual machine services, and users need to pay for the running time of the instance. Even if the application program only runs for a few minutes, the cost of starting and running EC2 instances is still high, so it is not suitable for applications with low frequency calls.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一種無伺服器計費服務，根據使用情況計費。它非常適合處理低頻、耗時的任務，因為使用者只需為實際執行時間付費，不需要管理底層基礎設施。這是最具成本效益的類固醇選擇。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a serverless billing service that is billed based on usage. It is ideal for processing low-frequency, time-consuming tasks because users only pay for the actual execution time and do not need to manage the underlying infrastructure. This is the most cost-effective steroid option.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在了解 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF) 的觀點。 AWS CAF 的哪個角度涉及策略管理功能？
question_text.en: A company is learning about the perspectives of the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF). Which perspective of the AWS CAF addresses the strategy management capability?

A.zh: 商業視角
A.en: Business perspective

B.zh: 人物視角
B.en: People perspective

C.zh: 治理視角
C.en: Governance perspective

D.zh: 營運視角
D.en: Operations perspective

A.zh: 正確。業務觀點著重於組織的業務目標和策略管理能力，包括如何透過雲端技術實現業務價值。它涉及策略規劃、財務管理和業務目標的銜接，因此與問題中的「策略管理能力」直接相關。
A.en: Correct. Business Perspective focuses on an organization's business goals and strategic management capabilities, including how to achieve business value through cloud technology. It involves the alignment of strategic planning, financial management and business objectives and is therefore directly related to the “strategy management capability” in the question.

B.zh: 錯誤。答案：正確答案：人員視角主要關注人員和文化轉型，例如訓練、技能提升和角色定義，與策略管理能力沒有直接關係。
B.en: Incorrect. Answer: A Correct Answer: A People Perspective focuses primarily on people and culture transformation, such as training, upskilling, and role definition, and is not directly related to strategic management capabilities.

C.zh: 錯誤。治理觀點主要關注風險管理、合規性和政策制定，儘管與管理相關，但並不直接涉及策略管理能力。
C.en: Incorrect. The Governance Perspective focuses primarily on risk management, compliance and policy development and, although related to management, does not directly address strategic management capabilities.

D.zh: 錯誤。營運觀點主要關注營運效率與服務交付，與策略管理能力沒有直接關係。
D.en: Incorrect. The Operations Perspective focuses primarily on operational efficiency and service delivery and is not directly related to strategic management capabilities.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (50%)； A (50%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：業務觀點著重於組織的業務目標和策略管理能力，包括如何透過雲端技術實現業務價值。它涉及策略規劃、財務管理和業務目標的銜接，因此與問題中的「策略管理能力」直接相關。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (50%); A (50%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Business Perspective focuses on an organization's business goals and strategic management capabilities, including how to achieve business value through cloud technology. It involves the alignment of strategic planning, financial management and business objectives and is therefore directly related to the “strategy management capability” in the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望整合其呼叫中心，以改善客戶與呼叫中心代理的語音和聊天體驗。哪種 AWS 服務或工具可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to consolidate its call centers to improve the customer voice and chat experience with call center agents. Which AWS service or tool will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon 簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)
A.en: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

B.zh: AWS 支援中心
B.en: AWS Support Center

C.zh: 亞馬遜 Cognito
C.en: Amazon Cognito

D.zh: 亞馬遜連接
D.en: Amazon Connect

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon SNS 是用於發佈和訂閱訊息的訊息服務。雖然它可以發送通知，但它不具有呼叫中心的功能，因此此選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon SNS is a messaging service for publishing and subscribing messages. While it can send notifications, it doesn't have the functionality of a call center, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是用來管理AWS支援請求的工具，與客戶呼叫中心無關，所以這個選項是。
B.en: Incorrect. is the tool used to manage AWS support requests and has nothing to do with customer call centers, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一項用於用戶身份驗證和管理的服務，雖然它可以幫助管理用戶，但它不提供呼叫中心功能，因此此選項是。
C.en: Incorrect. is a service for user authentication and management, and while it can help manage users, it does not provide call center functionality, so this option is.

D.zh: 正確。是一項雲端呼叫中心服務，專門設計用於改善客戶與呼叫中心代理的語音和聊天體驗。這個選項是。
D.en: Correct. is a cloud call center service designed specifically to improve the customer voice and chat experience with call center agents. This option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一項雲端呼叫中心服務，專門設計用於改善客戶與呼叫中心代理的語音和聊天體驗。這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a cloud call center service designed specifically to improve the customer voice and chat experience with call center agents. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 公司需要在需要時配置不間斷的 Amazon EC2 實例，並以秒數支付運算容量費用。哪種 EC2 執行個體購買選項可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to provision uninterruptible Amazon EC2 instances, when needed, and pay for compute capacity by the second. Which EC2 instance purchasing option will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 預留實例
A.en: Reserved Instances

B.zh: Spot 實例
B.en: Spot Instances

C.zh: 按需實例
C.en: On-Demand Instances

D.zh: 專用實例
D.en: Dedicated Instances

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：預留實例是使用者需要事先承諾使用一段時間（通常為1年或3年）的預留實例，不能按需啟動或按秒計費。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Reserved Instances are reserved instances that users need to commit to using for a certain period of time in advance (usually 1 or 3 years) and cannot be started on demand or billed by the second.

B.zh: 錯誤。競價實例是價格較低的競價實例，但可能會因市場需求而中斷，不適合需要不間斷運作的場景。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Spot Instances are spot instances with lower prices, but may be interrupted due to market demand and are not suitable for scenarios that require uninterrupted operation.

C.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：按需實例允許使用者按需啟動實例並按秒計費，適合需要靈活性和不間斷運行的場景。
C.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: On-Demand Instances allow users to launch instances on demand and bill them by the second, which is suitable for scenarios that require flexibility and uninterrupted operation.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：專用實例是在單一租用戶硬體上執行的專用實例，主要用於滿足合規性或隔離要求，但不強調按需啟動或按秒計費。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Dedicated Instances are dedicated instances that run on single-tenant hardware and are mainly used to meet compliance or isolation requirements, but do not emphasize on-demand startup or per-second billing.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：按需實例允許使用者按需啟動實例並按秒計費，適合需要靈活性和不間斷運行的場景。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: On-Demand Instances allow users to launch instances on demand and bill them by the second, which is suitable for scenarios that require flexibility and uninterrupted operation.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務可以將 Amazon EC2 執行個體從一個 AWS 區域移轉到另一個 AWS 區域？
question_text.en: Which AWS service can migrate Amazon EC2 instances from one AWS Region to another?

A.zh: AWS 應用程式遷移服務
A.en: AWS Application Migration Service

B.zh: AWS 資料庫遷移服務 (AWS DMS)
B.en: AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS)

C.zh: AWS DataSync
C.en: AWS DataSync

D.zh: AWS 遷移中心
D.en: AWS Migration Hub

A.zh: 正確。AWS Application Migration Service 是一項專門用於將伺服器（包括 Amazon EC2 執行個體）移轉到另一個 AWS 區域的服務。簡化遷移流程，支援跨地域遷移。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS Application Migration Service is a service specifically designed for migrating servers (including Amazon EC2 instances) to another AWS region. It simplifies the migration process and supports cross-region migration.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS DMS 主要用於遷移資料庫，而非 EC2 執行個體。不支援EC2實例的跨區域遷移。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS DMS is mainly used to migrate databases, not EC2 instances. It does not support cross-region migration of EC2 instances.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS DataSync 是一項用於遷移檔案資料的服務，適用於檔案系統之間的資料傳輸，而不是遷移 EC2 執行個體。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS DataSync is a service for migrating file data and is suitable for data transfer between file systems rather than migrating EC2 instances.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Migration Hub 是一個用於追蹤和管理遷移專案進度的輸入工具，但它本身並不會執行遷移任務，例如遷移 EC2 執行個體。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Migration Hub is an input tool used to track and manage the progress of migration projects, but it does not perform migration tasks itself, such as migrating EC2 instances.

answer_text.zh: A. AWS 應用程式遷移服務

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Application Migration Service 是一項專門用於將伺服器（包括 Amazon EC2 執行個體）移轉到另一個 AWS 區域的服務。簡化遷移流程，支援跨地域遷移。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Application Migration Service is a service specifically designed for migrating servers (including Amazon EC2 instances) to another AWS region. It simplifies the migration process and supports cross-region migration.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要阻止 SQL 注入攻擊。哪些 AWS 服務或功能提供此功能？
question_text.en: A company needs to block SQL injection attacks. Which AWS service or feature provides this functionality?

A.zh: AWS WAF
A.en: AWS WAF

B.zh: 網路 ACL
B.en: Network ACLs

C.zh: 安全群組
C.en: Security groups

D.zh: AWS 可信任顧問
D.en: AWS Trusted Advisor

A.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：AWS WAF（Web 應用程式防火牆）是一項專門設計用於保護 Web 應用程式免受 SQL 注入和跨站點腳本攻擊等常見攻擊的服務。它允許用戶定義規則來過濾流量。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS WAF (Web Application Firewall) is a service specifically designed to protect web applications from common attacks such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks. It allows users to define rules to filter traffic.

B.zh: 錯誤。網路ACL（網路存取控制清單）是一種用於在子網路層級控制入站和出站流量的工具，但它無法偵測和阻止SQL注入攻擊，因為它只處理IP位址和連接埠層級的規則。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Network ACLs (Network Access Control Lists) are a tool used to control inbound and outbound traffic at the subnet level, but it cannot detect and block SQL injection attacks because it only handles rules at the IP address and port level.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：安全群組是實例級防火牆，用於控制入站和出站流量，但它無法識別和阻止 SQL 注入攻擊，因為它不處理使用者層流量。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Security groups are instance-level firewalls used to control inbound and outbound traffic, but it cannot identify and block SQL injection attacks because it does not handle user layer traffic.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Trusted Advisor 是一種最佳化工具，用於檢查帳戶安全性、成本效率等，但不提供即時攻擊防護。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Trusted Advisor is an optimization tool used to check account security, cost efficiency, etc., but it does not provide real-time attack protection.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：AWS WAF（Web 應用程式防火牆）是一項專門設計用於保護 Web 應用程式免受 SQL 注入和跨站點腳本攻擊等常見攻擊的服務。它允許用戶定義規則來過濾流量。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS WAF (Web Application Firewall) is a service specifically designed to protect web applications from common attacks such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks. It allows users to define rules to filter traffic.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行其應用程式。公司需要將應用程式保留在本地，以滿足合規性要求。哪種 AWS 產品可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to run its application on Amazon EC2 instances. The company needs to keep the application on-premises to meet a compliance requirement. Which AWS offering will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 專用實例
A.en: Dedicated Instances

B.zh: 亞馬遜 CloudFront
B.en: Amazon CloudFront

C.zh: AWS Fargate
C.en: AWS Fargate

D.zh: AWS 前哨站
D.en: AWS Outposts

A.zh: 錯誤。是在單一租用戶硬體上執行的 Amazon EC2 實例，提供實體隔離以滿足某些合規性需求。然而，它們仍然運行在AWS雲端中，而不是本地，因此無法滿足「將應用程式部署在本地」的要求。這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. are Amazon EC2 instances running on single-tenant hardware that provide physical isolation to meet certain compliance needs. However, they still run in the AWS cloud, not on-premises, and thus fail to meet the requirement of "keeping applications deployed on-premises." This option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一種內容傳遞網路 (CDN) 服務，用於加速網站、影片和其他內容的分發。它與本地部署無關，並且不符合合規性要求。這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is a content delivery network (CDN) service used to accelerate the delivery of websites, videos, and other content. It is not relevant for on-premises deployments and does not meet compliance requirements. This option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一個用於運行容器化應用程式的無伺服器運算引擎。完全託管在AWS雲端中，無法滿足「應用程式部署在本地」的要求。這個選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. is a serverless computing engine for running containerized applications. It is fully hosted in the AWS cloud and cannot meet the requirement of "keeping the application deployed on-premises". This option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。是一種混合雲端解決方案，可讓客戶在本地環境中運行 AWS 服務，同時保持與 AWS 雲端的整合。它專門設計用於滿足需要本地部署的合規性要求。這個選項是。
D.en: Correct. is a hybrid cloud solution that allows customers to run AWS services in an on-premises environment while maintaining integration with the AWS cloud. It is specifically designed to meet compliance requirements that require on-premises deployment. This option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一種混合雲端解決方案，可讓客戶在本地環境中運行 AWS 服務，同時保持與 AWS 雲端的整合。它專門設計用於滿足需要本地部署的合規性要求。這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a hybrid cloud solution that allows customers to run AWS services in an on-premises environment while maintaining integration with the AWS cloud. It is specifically designed to meet compliance requirements that require on-premises deployment. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要連接其支援的 AWS 服務和 VPC。該公司不想將其內部流量暴露給公共網際網路。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to connect its supported AWS services and VPCs. The company does not want to expose its internal traffic to the public internet. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 亞馬遜檢查員
A.en: Amazon Inspector

B.zh: AWS PrivateLink
B.en: AWS PrivateLink

C.zh: 亞馬遜連接
C.en: Amazon Connect

D.zh: AWS 網際網路網關
D.en: AWS Internet Gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。是一項安全評估服務，用於檢查應用程式是否存在安全漏洞和合規性問題。與需要連接VPC和服務無關，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is a security assessment service that examines applications for security vulnerabilities and compliance issues. It has nothing to do with the need to connect the VPC and the service, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。可讓您透過專用網路連接 AWS 服務和 VPC，從而防止流量暴露至公用 Internet。這就是問題所要求的精確解，所以這個選項是。
B.en: Correct. allows you to connect AWS services and VPCs over a private network, preventing traffic from being exposed to the public Internet. This is the exact solution required by the question, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一個用於建構雲端聯絡中心的服務，與連接VPC和服務的需求無關，因此該選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. is a service for building cloud contact centers and has nothing to do with the need to connect VPCs and services, so this option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。用於將VPC連接到公共網際網路，問題明確要求防止流量暴露到公共網際網路，因此該選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. is used to connect VPC to the public Internet, and the question clearly requires preventing traffic from being exposed to the public Internet, so this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：可讓您透過專用網路連接 AWS 服務和 VPC，從而防止流量暴露至公用 Internet。這就是問題所要求的精確解，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: allows you to connect AWS services and VPCs over a private network, preventing traffic from being exposed to the public Internet. This is the exact solution required by the question, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服務可以使用政策管理 AWS 資源的權限？
question_text.en: Which AWS service can manage permissions for AWS resources by using policies?

A.zh: 亞馬遜檢查員
A.en: Amazon Inspector

B.zh: 亞馬遜偵探
B.en: Amazon Detective

C.zh: AWS 身分和存取管理 (IAM)
C.en: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

D.zh: 亞馬遜 GuardDuty
D.en: Amazon GuardDuty

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Inspector 是一項安全評估服務，用於檢查應用程式是否有安全漏洞以及是否不符合最佳實務。它不負責管理權限。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Inspector is a security assessment service that examines applications for security vulnerabilities and noncompliance with best practices. It is not responsible for administrative permissions.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Detective 是一項安全分析服務，用於幫助調查和識別潛在的安全問題。不涉及權限管理。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Detective is a security analysis service used to help investigate and identify potential security issues. It does not involve permission management.

C.zh: 正確。IAM是AWS的核心服務之一，用於管理使用者、群組和角色的權限。透過策略（Policies），IAM可以精確控制對AWS資源的存取。
C.en: Correct. IAM is one of the core services of AWS and is used to manage the permissions of users, groups, and roles. Through policies (Policies), IAM can precisely control access to AWS resources.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon GuardDuty 是一種威脅偵測服務，用於識別潛在的安全威脅。它不負責權限管理。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to identify potential security threats. It is not responsible for permission management.

answer_text.zh: C. AWS 身分和存取管理 (IAM)
answer_text.en: C. AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：IAM是AWS的核心服務之一，用於管理使用者、群組和角色的權限。透過策略（Policies），IAM可以精確控制對AWS資源的存取。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: IAM is one of the core services of AWS and is used to manage the permissions of users, groups, and roles. Through policies (Policies), IAM can precisely control access to AWS resources.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 公司需要在 AWS 雲端中執行部分工作負載。由於合規原因，該公司需要將部分工作負載保留在自己的現場資料中心。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to run some of its workload in the AWS Cloud. The company needs to keep some of the workload in its own on- site data center due to compliance reasons. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWSConfig
A.en: AWSConfig

B.zh: AWS 前哨站
B.en: AWS Outposts

C.zh: 亞馬遜 Lightsail
C.en: Amazon Lightsail

D.zh: 亞馬遜連接
D.en: Amazon Connect

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Config 是用於記錄和審核 AWS 資源配置的服務，主要用於合規性檢查和資源變更管理。它不提供混合雲解決方案，因此這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS Config is a service for recording and auditing AWS resource configurations, mainly used for compliance checking and resource change management. It does not provide a hybrid cloud solution, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。AWS Outposts 將 AWS 基礎架構和服務部署到客戶的本地資料中心，允許與 AWS 雲端集成，同時保持合規工作負載在本地運行。
B.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS Outposts deploy AWS infrastructure and services to customers' on-premises data centers, allowing integration with the AWS cloud while keeping compliant workloads running locally.

C.zh: 錯誤。是適用於小型應用程式和開發環境的簡化虛擬伺服器解決方案。它不支援混合雲場景，所以這個選項是。
C.en: Incorrect. is a simplified virtual server solution for small applications and development environments. It does not support hybrid cloud scenarios, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。是雲端聯絡中心服務，主要應用於客服場景，與混合雲無關，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. is a cloud contact center service mainly used in customer service scenarios and has nothing to do with hybrid cloud, so this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Outposts 將 AWS 基礎架構和服務部署到客戶的本地資料中心，允許與 AWS 雲端集成，同時保持合規工作負載在本地運行。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS Outposts deploy AWS infrastructure and services to customers' on-premises data centers, allowing integration with the AWS cloud while keeping compliant workloads running locally.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要部署一個在關聯式資料庫中儲存資料的應用程式。該公司希望由 AWS 管理自動備份和資料庫快照等資料庫任務。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to deploy an application that stores data in a relational database. The company wants database tasks, such as automated backups and database snapshots, to be managed by AWS. Which AWS service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 DocumentDB
A.en: Amazon DocumentDB

B.zh: 亞馬遜 RDS
B.en: Amazon RDS

C.zh: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)
C.en: Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS)

D.zh: 亞馬遜 S3
D.en: Amazon S3

A.zh: 錯誤。是專門用於處理JSON資料的文件資料庫服務，適用於非關係型資料庫場景。本題需要關係型資料庫，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is a document database service specifically designed to process JSON data and is suitable for non-relational database scenarios. The question requires a relational database, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。是一種託管關係型資料庫服務，支援自動化管理功能（如備份、快照、監控等）。符合題目要求，故此選項。
B.en: Correct. is a managed relational database service that supports automated management functions (such as backups, snapshots, monitoring, etc.). It meets the question requirements, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EBS 是一種區塊儲存服務，通常用於為 EC2 執行個體提供儲存支援。它不具備關係資料庫的管理能力，所以這個選項是。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon EBS is a block storage service commonly used to provide storage support for EC2 instances. It does not have the management capabilities of a relational database, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一種物件儲存服務，適合儲存非結構化資料（例如檔案、影像等）。它不支援關係型資料庫功能，所以這個選項是。
D.en: Incorrect. is an object storage service suitable for storing unstructured data (such as files, images, etc.). It does not support relational database functionality, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (67%)； C (33%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一種託管關係型資料庫服務，支援自動化管理功能（如備份、快照、監控等）。符合題目要求，故此選項。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (67%); C (33%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a managed relational database service that supports automated management functions (such as backups, snapshots, monitoring, etc.). It meets the question requirements, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家經營本地伺服器的公司決定開展新業務。該公司確定新的工作負載需要額外的伺服器。雲端運算的哪些優勢可以幫助公司盡快配置額外的基礎設施？
question_text.en: A company that operates on-premises servers decides to start a new line of business. The company determines that additional servers are required for the new workloads. Which advantage of cloud computing can help the company to provision additional infrastructure as quickly as possible?

A.zh: 受惠於大規模規模經濟
A.en: Benefit from massive economies of scale

B.zh: 提高速度與敏捷性
B.en: Increase speed and agility

C.zh: 將固定費用換成變動費用
C.en: Trade fixed expense for variable expense

D.zh: 幾分鐘內走向全球
D.en: Go global in minutes

A.zh: 錯誤。規模經濟的主要優勢是降低成本；這個問題需要快速配置額外的基礎設施，以適應雲端運算帶來的速度和敏捷性。
A.en: Incorrect. The main advantage of economies of scale is cost reduction; the question requires the rapid provisioning of additional infrastructure, corresponding to the speed and agility brought by cloud computing.

B.zh: 正確。雲端運算的主要優勢之一是能夠快速部署資源，讓企業能夠快速回應業務需求。這正是問題中的公司所需要的能力。
B.en: Correct. One of the main advantages of cloud computing is the ability to quickly deploy resources, allowing enterprises to quickly respond to business needs. This is exactly the capability the company in the question needs.

C.zh: 錯誤。這個選項描述了雲端運算的另一個優點，即成本模型的彈性，但與快速部署額外的基礎設施無關。
C.en: Incorrect. This option describes another advantage of cloud computing, which is the flexibility of the cost model, but not related to the rapid deployment of additional infrastructure.

D.zh: 錯誤。這個選項描述了雲端運算支援全球化的能力，但問題沒有提及全球化的必要性，而是重點放在額外基礎設施的快速部署。
D.en: Incorrect. This option describes the ability of cloud computing to support globalization, but the question does not mention the need for globalization, but focuses on the rapid deployment of additional infrastructure.

answer_text.zh: B. 提高速度與敏捷性

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：雲端運算的主要優勢之一是能夠快速部署資源，讓企業能夠快速回應業務需求。這正是問題中的公司所需要的能力。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: One of the main advantages of cloud computing is the ability to quickly deploy resources, allowing enterprises to quickly respond to business needs. This is exactly the capability the company in the question needs.
